title: The Red Tree
overview: When his father dies, Eliécer is left in charge of his half-sister. The decision not to take responsibility, forces him to the mission to take the girl to the capital to find her mother who abandoned her when she was a baby.

trailers.title: THE RED TREE Trailer | PÖFF 2021
trailers.channel_name: PÖFF | Tallinn Black Nights Film Festival
